lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.22019: CAN Steering Wheel Angle Fault (STRG) Calibration Fault)

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

AssistanceLevel.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ASSISTANCE_LEVEL/Percentage of assistance avaliable

FilteredVehicleSpeed.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: FILTERED VEHICLE SPEED/HEPS calculation ; information in use

ECUTemperature.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ECU_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

MotorTemperature.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Motor_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

lists.0: Not calibrated, no failure, not initialised

SystemMode.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: system mode (renault stateflow)

lists.5: Idle_stop and Torque_on flags enabled, others disabled
lists.6: Coast_stop and Torque_on flags enabled, others disabled
lists.9: Idle_stop and Assist_authorize flags enabled, others disabled
lists.10: Coast_stop and Assist_authorize flags enabled, others disabled
lists.12: Idle_stop and Coast_stop flags disabled, others enabled

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

BatteryVoltage.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VOLTAGE_ST/Computer supply voltage

ElectricalMotorSpeed.comment: cf spec DiagONCAN Electrical Motor Speed

lists.0: Activated (default value) => if TJP on, EPS shall switch to dedicated TJP mode
lists.1: Desactivated => if TJP on, EPS follows current selected driving mode

InternalFaultCode.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: INTERNAL_FAULT_CODE/Supplier fault code for this DTC

SAM_Job2Diag_Angle_Input.comment: Angle to simulate Job2Diag information sent by PEV station, in Plant Init SAM step

Front wheel circumference.comment: Value of DID to be added with offset value, which depends on EPS SysID

Rear wheel circumference.comment: Value of DID to be added with offset value, which depends on EPS SysID

Battery disconnection activation.comment: configuration of presence of Deco Batt function
